## etude run show

Show details of a run

```
etude run show <run-id> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for show
      --json   Emit the full run manifest (stages and gate attempts) as JSON
```

### SEE ALSO

* [etude run](etude_run.md)	 - Execute a workflow or inspect runs
